title: hebe tumida
intro: Hebe tumida, a perennial shrub native to New Zealand, is a member of the hebe family and is often referred to as the "tree hebe." The medicinal properties of Hebe tumida are attributed to its essential oil, which has antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Hebe tumida include its ability to support respiratory health, reduce stress and anxiety, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Hebe tumida is used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including colds and flu.
